  "claims": [
    "SB 540 aims to optimize California's energy markets and increase grid reliability.",
    "The Pathways bill is designed to boost grid reliability and reduce the risk of blackouts in California.",
    "The bill is expected to unlock the fastest and cheapest options for clean power growth in California.",
    "Enhanced coordination among western states will increase the amount of clean, affordable electricity for the region.",
    "The bill is projected to save California ratepayers up to nearly $800 million annually.",
    "A regional energy market would leverage diverse energy resources across the Western grid.",
